title: cicerbita decipiens
intro: Cicerbita decipiens, also known as false dandelion or climbing dandelion, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to Africa and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cicerbita decipiens include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cicerbita decipiens are often made from the leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas, infusions, or added to salads.
